items.name_en: Saint Laurent Mini 🆕 High-profile arrival🔥🔥🔥 Y-shaped badge envelope shoulder bag. Due to the bag's shape, the lining requires reverse stitching during production, so the leather quality is extremely high. Too brittle will wrinkle, too soft will lack structure and elasticity. After repeated prototyping, this boutique piece is finally presented to everyone💪💪Size: 20cm

items.name_en: YSL LouLou Puffer Washed Denim Bag
items.name_cn:
YSL LouLou Puffer Washed Denim Bag
This denim style has been a hit at counters this year. The washed denim feels soft and comfortable, with a chubby shape like holding a marshmallow. It has a high appearance value!
Full practicality + full retro style. It looks good and matches everything. Slightly smaller than YSL 25x17x6, Model 9009

items.name_en: 👏👏YSL Saint Laurent = Another hot new release🔥. This cross-stitch style has been incredibly popular lately. This veteran designer couldn't miss it. The strings look like mysterious warriors guarding their owners—loyal and aloof. Top-grain calfskin with caviar texture, vacuum IP plating, high recognition. You know it's SLP from afar. 30X20X8cm, Model=26808

items.name_en: YSL Saint Laurent Calfskin Woven Camera Bag|||【NEW】
items.name_cn:
YSL Saint Laurent Calfskin Woven Camera Bag|||【NEW】
Lou Camera Bag_Black with black woven gold buckle Italian calfskin camera bag
Very exquisite, adjustable shoulder strap with fashionable tassel pendant
Calfskin fabric, satin lining, with an internal slip pocket inside
Very practical and elegant. Style No. 71166
Dimensions: 23x16x6cm
